description: This GitBook is the long-form guide for seLe4n — a production-oriented microkernel written in Lean 4 with machine-checked proofs, targeting Raspberry Pi 5.
current_state_bullets: **Codebase metrics:** ~97k production LoC; ~12k test LoC across 22 suites (including AK3 regression suites and the AK4 end-to-end ABI round-trip suite); ~2,830 theorem/lemma declarations (zero sorry/axiom).

**Latest audit:** [`AUDIT_v0.29.0_COMPREHENSIVE`](../audits/AUDIT_v0.29.0_COMPREHENSIVE.md) — pre-1.0 full-kernel audit (2 CRITICAL, 23 HIGH, ~76 MED, ~101 LOW). WS-AK Phases AK1–AK4 complete (v0.29.1–v0.29.8); remaining phases AK5–AK10 target v1.0.0.

**Active workstream:** **WS-AK Phase AK4 COMPLETE** (v0.29.8) — Pre-1.0 Release Hardening (v0.29.0 audit), Phase AK4: ABI Bridge — Decode, Types, Validation (8 sub-tasks AK4-A through AK4-H; 1 CRITICAL, 2 HIGH, 4 MEDIUM, 8 LOW). Key fixes: AK4-A (R-ABI-C01 CRITICAL) IPC-buffer merge via `decodeSyscallArgsFromState` + `ipcBufferReadMr` — unblocks `serviceRegister`/`schedContextConfigure`; AK4-B (R-ABI-H02 HIGH) `decodeServiceRegisterArgs` validation tightened; AK4-C (R-ABI-H01 HIGH) `SchedContextId` newtype in Rust; AK4-F (R-ABI-M04) `IpcBuffer::set_mr` symmetry; AK4-G end-to-end `tests/AbiRoundtripSuite.lean`. Prior: AK3 (v0.29.3), AK2 (v0.29.2), AK1 (v0.29.1), **WS-AJ PORTFOLIO COMPLETE** (v0.28.1–v0.29.0), WS-AI (v0.27.7–v0.28.0), WS-AH (v0.27.2–v0.27.6), WS-AG (v0.26.0–v0.27.1), WS-AF–WS-B. **Next:** AK5 (Rust HAL Boot Hardening) through AK10 (Testing, Documentation & Closure); then WS-V (AG10: Hardware Integration).
**Workstream history:** [`docs/WORKSTREAM_HISTORY.md`](../WORKSTREAM_HISTORY.md) — complete portfolio record and roadmap.
**Metrics source of truth:** [`docs/codebase_map.json`](../../docs/codebase_map.json) (`readme_sync` key). Cross-check with `./scripts/report_current_state.py`.
**Historical records:** Milestone closeouts and prior audits in [`docs/dev_history/`](../dev_history/README.md).
